final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [9:0] count
);

    // Always block triggered on the rising edge of the clock
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 10'b0;  // Synchronous reset to zero
        end else begin
            count <= {count[8:0], ~count[9]};  // Johnson counter behavior
        end
    end

endmodule
